arts.ttl: Rangers fan dies in Istanbul ahead of UEL match
arts.sum: A Rangers fan has died in Istanbul ahead of the Scottish club's Europa League match against Fenerbahce on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Rangers fan dies in Istanbul ahead of match
arts.sum: Reports in the Turkish press suggest that the man was crossing the road in the early hours when he was hit by a car.

arts.ttl: Robert Snodgrass donates £1k to fundraiser for Rangers fan who died in Istanbul as total reaches almost £30k

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho's Rangers comment bodes well for Steven Gerrard return hopes
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has had his say on Rangers' managerial situation, with rumours of a potential Steven Gerrard return to Ibrox intensifying ahead of the Gers' Europa League clash with Fenerbahce

arts.ttl: Rangers 49ers takeover blueprint emerges as Leeds sporting director hunt throws up clues
arts.sum: The Ibrox giants are also on the lookout for a new sporting director to work alongside Nils Koppen

arts.ttl: Rangers XI vs Fenerbahce – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Rangers travel to Turkey to face Fenerbahce in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie tonight. The Scottish side are enduring a tough period, following three shock defeats – all on home soil – in their last five fixtures. arts.ttl: Mourinho: I have many problems, racism isn't one
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has again denied that his comments in the aftermath of Fenerbahce's derby clash with Galatasaray were racially motivated.
